# Derivations of Expressions Used in Report

## pdf of the Shifted Exponential

$$
F_X(x|\beta) = [1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}]^n, x>0
$$

$$
F'_X(x|\beta)=(n)(1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})^{n-1}(\frac{1}{\beta}e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})
$$

$$
f_X(x|\beta)=(\frac{n}{\beta})(e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})(1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})^{n-1}
$$

## Derivation of Maximum Value of the pdf

$$
f_X(x|\beta)=(\frac{n}{\beta})(e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})(1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})^{n-1}
$$

$$
f'_X(x|\beta)=\frac{d}{dx}[(\frac{n}{\beta})(e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})(1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})^{n-1}]
$$

$$
f'_X(x|\beta)=\frac{n}{\beta}[(-\frac{1}{\beta}e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})(1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})^{n-1}+(e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})((n-1)((1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})^{n-2})(\frac{1}{\beta}e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}))]
$$

$$
f'_X(x|\beta)=[ {{\color{purple}{ \left(-\frac{n}{\beta^2} \right) }}} {{\color{orange}{e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}}}} ] {{\color{green}{(1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})^{n-1}}}} + (e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}) \left( (n-1) {{\color{green}{(1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})^{n-2}}}} {{\color{purple}{ \left(\frac{n}{\beta^2} \right) }}} {{\color{orange}{e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}}}} \right)
$$

$$
f'_X(x|\beta)=[-\frac{n}{\beta^2}][e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}][1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}]((n-1)(e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}-(1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}))
$$

$$
f'_X(x|\beta)= {{\color{red}{\left[-\frac{n}{\beta^2}\right]\left[e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}\right]\left[1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}\right]^{n-2}}}} \left((n-1)e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}-(1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})\right)=0
$$ $$
(n-1)e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}-(1-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}})=0 \rightarrow ne^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}} {{\color{red}{-e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}}}} -1 {{\color{red}{+e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}}}} = 0
$$ $$
ne^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}-1=0 \rightarrow e^{-\frac{x-L}{\beta}}=\frac{1}{n}
$$ $$
-\frac{x-L}{\beta}=ln(\frac{1}{n}) \rightarrow \frac{x-L}{\beta}=-ln(\frac{1}{n})
$$

$$
\frac{x-L}{\beta}=ln{((\frac{1}{n})^{-1})}
$$

$$
\frac{x-L}{\beta}=ln(n)
$$

$$
x=L+\beta ln(n)
$$
